title: Skill Contribute & Edit Workflow
desc: Create, update, and partially edit wkappbot skills. contribute = create or full-update. edit = partial update (title/desc/tags/steps only). Auto version-bumped on every save.
steps: UPDATE (full): wkappbot skill contribute --app X --title "..." --desc "..." --id existing-id
EDIT title: wkappbot skill edit <id> --title "New Title" (other fields preserved)
EDIT desc: wkappbot skill edit <id> --desc "New description"
RENAME slug: wkappbot skill delete <old-id> && contribute --id <new-slug> ...
Auto-install: skills/ ??HQ on every publish (skill install runs in build)
author: claude
